title: Better Questing Unofficial Tweaker (BQUTweaker)
description: Tweaker mod to change some aspects of Better Questing Unofficial
body:
A branch of BQTweaker, modified to work with Better Questing Unofficial and include its newer changes and remove the overlapping changes.

#### If you are still using the original Better Questing, then get BQTweaker here: https://modrinth.com/mod/bqtweaker

### Current Changes:
- Redesigns the Quest-Line page layout.
- Adds a rebindable key-bind for the back button, bound by default to "Backspace".
- Adds Image and Link embedding in Quest descriptions.
- Redesign the Quest page layout
- Make the description and rewards panes scroll together in a single pane.
- Removed the view mode as it bypasses the point of always-hidden quests.
- Fixed quest completion counter counting always-hidden quests.

Image and Link embedding functions identically as it does in the original BQTweaker, the instructions for using it and images can be referenced there: https://modrinth.com/mod/bqtweaker

 

This mod is only required client-side, but won't cause issue if placed on a server.

Please direct any issues and suggestions to the Github, linked through the issues tab at the top of the page.
